ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade transaction */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade transaction */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Time of the trade transaction */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the security traded */,
  "security_name" TEXT /* Name of the security traded */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client who made the trade */,
  "buy_sell" TEXT /* Type of trade (BUY or SELL) */,
  "quantity_traded" INTEGER /* Quantity of the security traded */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Trade price or weighted average price */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission or fees associated with the trade */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue or exchange where the trade was executed */,
  "reference_number" TEXT /* Reference number for the trade */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., PENDING, EXECUTED, CANCELLED) */,
  "execution_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the execution (if the trade is split into multiple executions) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who executed the trade */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Additional remarks or notes about the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES securities ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "client_type" TEXT /* Type of client (e.g., Individual, HUF, Fund) */,
  "client_status" TEXT /* Status of the client account (e.g., ACTIVE, INACTIVE, SUSPENDED) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the client */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the client */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax identification number of the client */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., Brokerage, Retirement) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the client account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "symbol" TEXT /* Unique symbol of the security */,
  "security_name" TEXT /* Name of the security */,
  "security_type" TEXT /* Type of security (e.g., Equity, Bond) */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Issuer of the security */,
  "listing_exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the security is listed */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the security is traded */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) for the security */,
  "sedol" TEXT /* Stock Exchange Daily Official List (SEDOL) number for the security */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures (CUSIP) number for the security */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the security */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the security belongs (e.g., Technology, Healthcare) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the security was added to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_status" TEXT /* Status of the portfolio (e.g., ACTIVE, INACTIVE, ARCHIVED) */,
  "portfolio_type" TEXT /* Type of portfolio (e.g., Aggressive, Conservative, Balanced) */,
  "target_allocation" TEXT /* Target allocation for the portfolio (e.g., 60% Equity, 40% Bonds) */,
  "rebalance_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the portfolio is rebalanced (e.g., Monthly, Quarterly) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_holds" (
  "hold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the portfolio */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the security held */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the security held */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of the security held */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the holding was last updated */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the security was first purchased in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the security was first purchased */,
  "current_market_value" REAL /* Current market value of the holding */,
  "cost_basis" REAL /* Cost basis of the holding (total cost of the security) */,
  "performance" REAL /* Performance of the holding (e.g., percentage gain/loss) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holds_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holds_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES securities ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Trader, Analyst, Admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user has admin privileges */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., Trading, Analytics) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
